Visual_Theme: Bright turquoise shallows over a pale sandbar
Description: Sunlit water barely waist-deep, calm until something pale slides beneath the surface.
A stretch of wet sand and grounded driftwood, stranded sea life still twitching in the shallow pools.

Visual_Theme: Dense kelp forest swaying in the current
Description: Visibility drops to almost nothing between the kelp fronds; things brush past unseen.

Visual_Theme: Tidepool flats cut by narrow channels
Description: Dozens of shallow pools connected by trickling channels, each one hiding something.

Visual_Theme: Half-submerged ruins guarded by a barbed shape
Description: An old shrine swallowed by the tide, its altar circled endlessly by a scarred ray.

Visual_Theme: Brine-slick sea cave, salt crusting the walls
Description: The tide carved this cave deep into the cliffside; salt crystals glitter where torchlight reaches.

Visual_Theme: Undertow channel with a fast-pulling current
Description: The current here is strong enough to drag careless feet — and stronger things use it to hunt.
Jagged reef spires break the waterline, encrusted with barnacles and old wreckage.

Visual_Theme: Deep current sinkhole descending into dark water
Description: The cave floor drops away into black water with no visible bottom.

Visual_Theme: Flooded trench entrance, key-locked stone door
Description: The zone's final passage — a drowned stone archway that only opens for a bearer of the trench key.
